---
title: &TITLE "First Last"
categories: [phd]   # pi | postdoc | phd | msc | alumni
subtitle: "Role Title"
description: ""
education: "Degree | Institution | Year"
image: avatar.jpg
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs
  contents:
    - "../../publications/**/index.qmd"
    - "!../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  filter-ui: false
  include:
    author: *TITLE
  fields: [image, title, author, journ, volume, issue, page, year, date, url_source, haiku, categories]
page-layout: full
about:
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.jpg
---

:::{#about}

Bio text here.

## Education
{{< meta education >}}

<br>

:::

## Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
